content: Re-confirm domain boundaries on the exact staged diffs (not re-derive from scratch -- trail e5e3107f already ran a clo check on the proposal text). Success condition: explicit pass/fail against Law 4 for each of the four target files.
Apply Diff 1 and Diff 2 to trail-schema.md and orchestrator-role/SKILL.md respectively. Success condition: both files contain the exact staged text, verified by re-reading after write.
Apply Diff 3 to checker-role/SKILL.md. Success condition: new check inserted in the stated position, existing checks renumbered, file re-read to confirm.
Append EC-010 to earned-constraints.md verbatim as staged in proposed-EC-010.md, additive only -- no existing entries edited or renumbered. Success condition: file re-read to confirm append-only.

Do NOT touch catalog/skills.json or either marketplace.json twin -- this initiative doesn't register a new package, it hardens two existing ones in place, so nothing needs a new catalog entry. Success condition: those files untouched, confirmed by not calling any write tool against them.
